wine_retailers.name: Etim Wine Shop (Cooperativa Falset Marca)
wine_retailers.address: Avinguda de la Catalunya 2, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_retailers.speciality: Full range of Etim cooperative labels including Etim Garnacha, Etim Negre, and limited single-parcel releases at cooperative pricing
wine_retailers.description: The cooperative shop inside the 1919 Martinell building selling the full Etim range direct; the most accessible retail source for Montsant cooperative wine.

wine_retailers.name: Bodega Scala Dei Shop
wine_retailers.address: Rambla de la Cartoixa s/n, 43379 Escaladei, Tarragona, Spain
wine_retailers.speciality: Full Scala Dei range from the Cartoixa site direct; Negre Scala Dei, Cartoixa Scala Dei and limited single-vineyard releases
wine_retailers.description: On-site shop at Bodega Scala Dei adjacent to the Carthusian ruins; full Scala Dei DOQ Priorat range at winery prices, open during visiting hours.

verified.address_quoted: Rambla de la Cartoixa s/n, 43379 Escaladei

wine_retailers.name: Hostal Sport Wine Cellar Shop
wine_retailers.address: Carrer Miquel Barcelo 6, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_retailers.speciality: Nearly 100 years of assembled Priorat and Montsant back-vintages; bottles purchasable from the hotel cellar at listed prices
wine_retailers.description: The Hostal Sport's cellar shop offers back-vintage DOQ Priorat at hotel-cellar prices; the deepest vertical selection in Falset.

wine_retailers.name: Celler Val Llach Shop
wine_retailers.address: Carrer de la Font 38, 43739 Porrera, Tarragona, Spain
wine_retailers.speciality: Val Llach Embruix, Porrera, and the estate's single-village releases; direct sales from the Porrera cellar
wine_retailers.description: Direct sales at Celler Val Llach in Porrera; all Val Llach DOQ Priorat labels available at winery pricing during visiting hours.

wine_retailers.name: Celler El Masroig Shop
wine_retailers.address: Carrer Sant Antoni 11, 43736 El Masroig, Tarragona, Spain
wine_retailers.speciality: Les Sorts, Sola Fred and cooperative single-variety Montsant wines direct from the El Masroig cooperative at estate pricing
wine_retailers.description: El Masroig cooperative shop selling the full Les Sorts and Sola Fred DO Montsant range; cooperative pricing and online sales for remote buyers.

wine_retailers.name: El Celler de l'Aspic Wine Shop
wine_retailers.address: Carrer de la Miralda 31, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_retailers.speciality: Wine shop attached to the restaurant with hard-to-find back-vintages of Priorat and rare small-producer bottles curated by the sommelier
wine_retailers.description: The bottle shop attached to El Celler de l'Aspic; sommelier-curated back-vintages and rare small-producer DOQ Priorat not widely available elsewhere in the region.

wine_retailers.name: Clos Mogador Direct Sales
wine_retailers.address: Camino Manyetes s/n, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
wine_retailers.speciality: Estate Clos Mogador and Manyetes labels sold direct at the winery by appointment; allocation-only for the top-tier cuvees
wine_retailers.description: Direct cellar-door sales at Clos Mogador in Gratallops; the Manyetes range and main Clos Mogador available at estate prices during scheduled visits.

wine_retailers.name: Mas Doix Direct Sales
wine_retailers.speciality: Salanques, Mas Doix and 1902 labels sold direct at the Poboleda cellar by appointment
wine_retailers.description: Cellar-door sales at Mas Doix in Poboleda; the full Mas Doix range including old-vine Salanques available at winery prices during estate visits.

wine_retailers.name: Costers del Siurana Direct Sales
wine_retailers.address: Camino de la Bassa s/n, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
wine_retailers.speciality: Clos de l'Obac and Miserere labels sold at the Gratallops estate by appointment; also Dolc de l'Obac sweet Garnacha
wine_retailers.description: Direct cellar-door sales at Costers del Siurana in Gratallops; the Clos de l'Obac and Miserere range available at estate prices during appointment visits.

verified.address_quoted: Camino de la Bassa s/n, Gratallops

wine_retailers.name: Covides Cava Shop
wine_retailers.address: Carretera N-420 km 85, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_retailers.speciality: Covides cooperative Cava and still Catalan wines; a useful comparison retail point for visitors arriving from Penedes along the N-420
wine_retailers.description: Roadside cooperative shop at the Falset approach offering Covides Cava and still Catalan wines; useful for visitors completing the Penedes-to-Priorat route.
